gh_294a6653c881356dfec479bd.title: [FULLY REMOTE] 𝗔𝗜 𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗔𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘀𝘁 at Jobsity
gh_294a6653c881356dfec479bd.description:
## About [Jobsity](https://www.jobsity.com/)💡
Jobsity is a New York–based staffing company with 10+ years of experience, working with clients across the US, Canada, and Europe. We connect top-tier LATAM talent—only the top 3%—with long-term international opportunities and have successfully placed over 400 professionals across 15+ countries. As part of our recruitment process, we focus on finding the right role based on what matters most to you.

## Requirements
At [Jobsity](https://www.linkedin.com/company/jobsity-llc/), we’re looking for an 𝗔𝗜 𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗔𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘀𝘁  to ensure the performance, safety, and reliability of our cutting-edge AI/ML models🤖

𝗪̳𝗵̳𝗮̳𝘁̳ ̳𝗱̳𝗼̳ ̳𝘆̳𝗼̳𝘂̳ ̳𝗻̳𝗲̳𝗲̳𝗱̳ ̳𝘁̳𝗼̳ ̳𝗮̳𝗽̳𝗽̳𝗹̳𝘆̳ ̳𝘀̳𝘂̳𝗰̳𝗰̳𝗲̳𝘀̳𝘀̳𝗳̳𝘂̳𝗹̳𝗹̳𝘆̳?🥇
🌟 Conversational English level (+B2 level)
🌟 Must reside in LATAM🌎
🌟 Proven experience in a quality assurance, testing, or data analysis role within the AI/ML domain.
🌟 Deep understanding of the machine learning lifecycle and common AI model failure modes.
🌟 Hands-on experience with data annotation, data validation, and managing large datasets.
🌟 Experience with bug tracking systems (e.g., Jira) and test case management tools.
🌟 (Preferred) Basic scripting skills (e.g., Python) for test automation and data manipulation.

𝗧𝗮𝘀𝗸𝘀:
⚙️ Evaluation & Benchmarking – Develop test cases and benchmarks to assess model performance and identify failures.
⚙️ Error Analysis & Defect Triage – Investigate model issues, identify root causes, and prioritize fixes.
⚙️ Adversarial Testing (Red Teaming) – Test models with challenging scenarios to uncover unexpected behaviors and vulnerabilities.

## Modality
👨‍💻 Fully remote

## Perks that Jobsity offers!💎

🔹Yearly paid vacation.
🔹Paid local holidays.
🔹Learning budget.
🔹Financing program for equipment and home office supplies.
🔹Bonuses for referrals and more!

## Type of contract📜

This role is full-time!🕘
...working remotely🏡, with USD payment💰, long-term relationship🤝, within an international team👩‍💻 👨‍💻, and working on international client projects!🌎

## How to apply🤔
Send an email to [angela.barboza@jobsity.com](mailto:angela.barboza@jobsity.com) with your CV/LinkedIn attached, and please send it in the subject: "𝘼𝙄 𝙌𝙪𝙖𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙮 𝘼𝙣𝙖𝙡𝙮𝙨𝙩 - 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯📧"

## How to refer a friend🤔
Refer a friend👥 sending an email with your friend's CV/LinkedIn attached with the subject: "**Referral for** 𝘼𝙄 𝙌𝙪𝙖𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙮 𝘼𝙣𝙖𝙡𝙮𝙨𝙩- 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯📧"
Or you can use this link👉 https://careers.jobsity.com/referral-program

## Any questions or additional details needed?
Feel free to send me a message on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/angela-barboza/)💬

gh_29e5a819609426e7fb30ddaf.title: [REMOTE - OFFER UP TO 90M GROSS] Senior AI-Native Python Developer
gh_29e5a819609426e7fb30ddaf.description:
**🚀 We’re hiring: Senior AI-Native Python Developer** 

**Location:** Remote (VN timezone)  
**Salary:** Up to 90M gross  

## About us
DTalent's Client is a remote-first team of 90+ engineers helping companies from startups to enterprises build high-quality software products.  
We value long-term partnerships, strong engineering culture, and continuous learning.

## Role
As a **Senior AI-Native Python Developer**, you’ll work at the intersection of **AI, automation, and cloud** to build production-ready solutions.

## Responsibilities
- Build AI-native systems using LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, LangChain, LiteLLM, Semantic Kernel).  
- Design APIs with **FastAPI / NestJS**.  
- Develop automation pipelines for CI/CD & testing with LLMs.  
- Build scalable frontends (**React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS**).  
- Manage AWS infra (**Lambda, S3, RDS, Cognito, CloudWatch**).  

## Requirements
- 5+ years in **Python development** (AI/LLM applications).  
- Strong in **LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, agent frameworks**.  
- Proficient in **FastAPI, PostgreSQL (JSONB, full-text search)**.  
- Skilled in modern frontend (**React, TS, TailwindCSS**).  
- Experience with **AWS serverless, CI/CD, Docker, IaC**.  
- Good communication in **English + Vietnamese**.  

_Nice to have: RoR legacy, OAuth2, SaaS billing, OpenWebUI customization._  

## Benefits
- 🌍 Remote-first (work from anywhere)  
- 📅 Mon–Fri, 8h/day (VN timezone)  
- 🏖 22 paid leaves from 5th year  
- 💻 Work equipment support  
- 💰 Competitive salary + annual & performance bonuses  
- 🎓 Certification support & monthly coaching  
- 🏢 Optional office: Hanoi / HCMC  

## Hiring process
1. (Optional) Assessment  
2. Tech interview (live code)  
3. Client interview (1–2 rounds)  
4. Final with CP Founder + Offer  

_All rounds in English. Please ensure stable internet & camera._  

---

👉 Apply here: Tramcao@dtalent.vn
